alert.title: Disk Usage Critical — Production Database
alert.description: Disk utilization on prod-db-primary-03 has reached 96.2% on /data volume. Growth rate: 2.1% per hour over last 6 hours. At current rate, disk will be full in approximately 1.8 hours. PostgreSQL WAL files are the primary consumer.

context.host_role: Primary PostgreSQL database — serves patient records API
context.replication_status: Streaming replication to prod-db-replica-01 is healthy
context.recent_changes: Debug logging enabled yesterday for query performance investigation
